name: Nguyen Phan Nguyen
paragraphs: I am Nguyen Nguyen, pronounced like "win-win," or Stephen. I am a Data Science student at Virginia Tech.

My journey to who I am today began the moment I became a TEDx speaker. I gave a talk called "A Wary but Positive Look at AI," played guitar on stage, and spoke about AI, emotion, and what it means to be human. I felt alive doing it.

Now, I love music, art, and storytelling, and I believe I can be a data magician: someone who transforms huge, messy data into beautiful storylines for any company. I want to work with AI in a way that is not just technically strong, but human enough to solve people problems. Simply put, I have people skills.
But there is one thing I still doubt AI can fully hold.
There is no "I" in AI. Does AI really have emotion, or does it borrow ours to make us feel?
And what happens when AI becomes an artist or a musician?
